mdSummary:
# Carousel

Slide-based content rotator with autoplay and keyboard nav.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/carousel

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Carousel | Orientation | `CarouselOrientation` | `CarouselOrientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Carousel | Loop | `bool` | `` |  |
| Carousel | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Carousel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Carousel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Carousel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselContent | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CarouselContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Index | `int?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Total | `int?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselNext | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselNext | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselNext | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CarouselPrevious | Context | `Carousel.CarouselContext` | `default!` |  |
| CarouselPrevious | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CarouselPrevious | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Carousel) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CarouselContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CarouselItem) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `CarouselContent`, `CarouselItem`, `CarouselNext`, `CarouselPrevious`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Carousel.CarouselContext`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()
- `ThemeService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `ArrowUp` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowUp in Carousel.razor
- `ArrowDown` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowDown in Carousel.razor

## Example
```razor
<Carousel />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Carousel/Carousel.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselContent.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselItem.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselNext.razor`
- `UI/Carousel/CarouselPrevious.razor`
